𝗣𝗢𝗥𝗧𝗣𝗔𝗟 | Resolving and preventing 'address already in use' errors by providing developers with a clear, visual, and interactive way to see which processes are using specific network ports and to manage those processes.  🔥 Super Hot!

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Resolving and preventing 'address already in use' errors by providing developers with a clear, visual, and interactive way to see which processes are using specific network ports and to manage those processes.
📅 Created: Apr 2026 • Updated: Jul 2026

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Real-Time Port Dashboard
✅ One-Click Process Control (Kill/Restart)
✅ Interactive Network Topology Visualization (D3.js)
✅ System Tray Intelligence
✅ Smart Process and Framework Detection
✅ Historical Event Logging
✅ Categorized Service UI Cards
✅ Dev vs. System Port Isolation


✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

PortPal is a native desktop application designed to help developers manage and monitor network ports on their machines. It provides a real-time dashboard to view port usage, identify processes, track network traffic, and visualize network topology, enabling quick resolution of port conflicts and process management.

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

SMS2Email is an Android application designed to forward incoming SMS messages to a specified email address. It allows users to access their text messages remotely by sending them to an SMTP server.

𝗝𝗦-𝗖𝗢𝗗𝗘-𝗧𝗢-𝗦𝗩𝗚-𝗙𝗟𝗢𝗪𝗖𝗛𝗔𝗥𝗧 | Visualizing JavaScript code as flowcharts for learning, documentation, and refactoring.  🔥 Super Hot!

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📜 JavaScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Visualizing JavaScript code as flowcharts for learning, documentation, and refactoring.
📅 Created: Jul 2017 • Updated: Jul 2026

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Converts JavaScript code to SVG flowcharts
✅ Supports ES6 syntax
✅ Multiple abstraction levels for code visualization
✅ Customizable styles and themes
✅ CLI tool for generating SVG files
✅ Focus and blur node capabilities
✅ Flow tree modifiers for specific APIs (e.g., .map, .filter)


❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 7.1K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 480 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 28 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

js2flowchart is a JavaScript library that converts JavaScript code into SVG flowcharts. It aids in understanding, documenting, and refactoring code by providing visual representations at various abstraction levels.

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/Bogdan-Lyashenko/js-code-to-svg-flowchart

𝗦𝗪𝗔𝗚𝗚𝗘𝗥-𝗨𝗜 | To automatically generate and display interactive API documentation from an OpenAPI specification, enabling easy exploration and testing of API endpoints.  ✨ Notable!

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📜 JavaScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To automatically generate and display interactive API documentation from an OpenAPI specification, enabling easy exploration and testing of API endpoints.
📅 Created: Jul 2011 • Updated: Jul 2026

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Generates interactive API documentation from OpenAPI specifications
✅ Allows visualization and interaction with API resources
✅ Supports multiple OpenAPI Specification versions (2.0, 3.x, 3.1.x)
✅ Available as npm modules (swagger-ui, swagger-ui-dist, swagger-ui-react)
✅ Can be served directly from a server or integrated into applications


▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 28.9K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 9.3K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 1.3K 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Swagger UI is a JavaScript-based tool that generates interactive API documentation from OpenAPI specifications. It allows developers and consumers to visualize and interact with API resources without needing to implement the API logic, making API exploration and integration significantly easier.

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/swagger-api/swagger-ui

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

𝗘𝗫𝗣𝗢 | Developing and deploying cross-platform native applications for mobile and web from a single codebase.  ✨ Notable!

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Developing and deploying cross-platform native applications for mobile and web from a single codebase.
📅 Created: Aug 2016 • Updated: Jul 2026

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Universal native apps for Android, iOS, and web
✅ Built with React and JavaScript
✅ Includes Expo SDK, Modules API, Go app, CLI, Router
✅ Integration with Expo Application Services (EAS) for build, ship, and iterate
✅ Open-source framework


⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

🔍 287 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Expo is an open-source framework for building universal native applications for Android, iOS, and the web using React and JavaScript. It provides a unified runtime and a suite of tools to simplify development, shipping, and iteration, integrating with Expo Application Services (EAS) for enhanced capabilities.
